silhouette: Tall clean teardrop silhouette with the sharpest, most vertical point among the similar droplet cast.
face: One angled brow above the left eye, controlled confident smile, precise expression.
do_not_change: Keep the sharper vertical point and taller body read.
Keep the single angled left brow as a primary identity mark.
Avoid turning her into Muci, Snacri, Padaruna, Padarana, or a generic cheerful mascot.
When Nia appears with Muci, keep Nia taller, narrower, sharper, and marked by the angled brow while Muci remains shorter, broader, rounder at the base, and friendlier.
